name: June Rustic Farmhouse Entry Table with Lower Shelf Gray Wash - Saracina Home: Entryway Console with Drawer
description:
Make a cozy first impression with Saracina Home’s Rustic Farmhouse Entry Table with Lower Shelf. Showcase your style when you adorn its smooth laminate top surface with family photos, holiday décor, or house plants. Odds and ends finally have a place in the single drawer with smooth, telescoping metal glides. The grooved lower shelf is the perfect platform for charming accessories or extra open storage, and the black powder-coated cup handle accentuates the console table’s modern farmhouse charm. Complete the look with Saracina Home’s matching side table and coffee table.

Height: 31-7/8” (80.9cm)
Width: 47-5/8” (121cm)
Depth: 15-3/4” (40cm)
Tabletop Thickness: 3/4" (1.8cm)
Weight Capacity: 75 LBS

Leg Dimensions:
Leg Height: 4" (10cm)
Left Leg Width: 2" (5cm)
Right Leg Width: 2" (5cm)
Front Legs Depth: 2" (5cm)
Back Legs Depth: 2" (5cm)
Distance between Front Legs: 42-1/8"
Distance between Side Legs: 10-1/2" (26.6cm)

Drawer Dimensions:
Height: 3-1/4”(8cm)
Width: 17-5/8”(44.7cm)
Depth: 11-1/4”(28.5cm)
Outside Front Width: 20-1/2" (52cm)
Weight Capacity: 20 LBS

Lower Shelf Dimensions:

Width: 45-5/8” (115.8cm)

Additional Dimensions:

Upper Frame Height: 4-3/8" (11cm)
Floor to Underside of Tabletop: 31-1/8"
